questionHtml: Outline the changes in elk population between the years 1930 and 2004.
markschemeHtml:
a. between 1930 and 1968 the numbers were reduced;

b. after 1968/in the 1970s the numbers increased;

c. in 1990s1995 the numbers decreased again;

d. lowest in 1968 and highest in 1990;

meta.title: Outline the changes in elk population between the years 1930 and 2004.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
